title: Income, the Earned Income Tax Credit, and Infant Health
notes: TWO SEPARATE EVENT STUDY PDFs â€” event_study_script.R produces: (a) event_study_com_controles.pdf and (b) event_study_sem_controles.pdf. MATCHES: TWFE exact; SA exact for both (single cohort â†’ SA=TWFE with SA FEs); CS-NT exact for BOTH variants. APPROXIMATIONS: BJS ~5-12% gap (aggregation). CS-NT KEY FIX: racemiss=0 for ALL parvar==1 (control) units â†’ must exclude from xformla in att_gt(dr) â€” Stata drops it silently, R fails. Use xformla=~stateres_f + other + black + age2 + age3 + high + hispanic + hispanicmiss (no racemiss). base_period='universal' required to match Stata long2 pre-period estimates. Stata csdid2 uses method=dripw when i.stateres added; R equivalent: est_method='dr'. BJS: cell_id=parvar*100+stateres (1632 aggregated rows), did_imputation R has no 'controls' argument â€” pass via first_stage = ~ctrl | cell_id + effective. Data: id_21.dta, filter effective 1991-1998 + dmeducgrp<=2 + marital==2. _I* interaction vars precomputed in data; include with backtick quoting in feols formula. | AUDIT 2026-04-19: Paper-auditor WARN 9.3% (stored -0.387 vs paper -0.354). Metadata previously claimed 'TWFE exact' but current template re-run produces -0.387 stably â€” template drift since original metadata was written. Pipeline re-run 2026-04-19 confirms same value. Not a metadata fix; requires template investigation (out of scope for iterative review). 9th instance of Lesson 7 direct-level Spec A collapse (10 individual-level ctrls with racemiss dropped â†’ 0/NA). TWFE without ctrls -0.447 (-13% more extreme), CS-NT no-ctrls -0.403 (between the two TWFE specs). Direction unanimous.
